prompt: Create a masterpiece 9:16 vertical, 8K ultra-HD, hyper-realistic cinematic editorial double exposure portrait of a young Asian woman with calm expression, blue-green eyes, natural matte makeup, realistic skin with subtle freckles, and medium-length wavy ash blonde, platinum, and silver hair gently blowing in the wind. She wears a dark winter jacket and a thick light-brown knitted scarf. Blend her portrait with elegant mixed media elements including grunge textures, watercolor splashes, ink effects, architectural blueprints, wireframes, geometric lines, concrete textures, and transparent digital overlays. Add naturally floating golden yellow, burnt orange, and copper autumn maple leaves. Use a clean white minimalist background with abstract paint splashes, modern editorial typography featuring the large vertical word "FANTASTIC", subtle grid layouts, and graphic design elements. Apply soft cinematic lighting, HDR, ray tracing, global illumination, volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, sharp eye focus, luxury magazine cover aesthetics, premium color grading, and award-winning photorealistic quality.
